002-cookie-consent.notes: Regenerated 2026-01-12 with v5 skill. Both wireframes pass validator (0 errors). Modal flow shows dark overlay, granular toggles. Privacy settings shows data rights management.

003-user-authentication.notes: Regenerated 2026-01-12 with v5 skill. All 3 wireframes pass validator (0 errors). Registration/Sign-in shows forms with OAuth. Verification shows email and password reset flows. Profile shows session management.

004-mobile-first-design.notes: Generated 2026-01-12. Both wireframes pass validator (0 errors). Mobile viewport layouts showing 320-428px frames with touch targets. Performance testing showing Core Web Vitals dashboard.

005-security-hardening.notes: Generated 2026-01-12. All 3 wireframes pass validator (0 errors). Sign-in security UX shows password strength, lockout, email validation. Session management shows timeout warning modal. Admin dashboard shows audit trail and status panels.
